title: Espoo, Uusimaa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Espoo, Uusimaa: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Espoo is a city in Uusimaa with a population of 293,000. A tech-driven city in Greater Helsinki, home to Aalto University and Nokia’s headquarters, surrounded by nature.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
